summary: Phase 2 testing — backend fully passing (14/14 pytest), frontend has CRITICAL ReferenceError in ProspectSheet that breaks mark-lost & restore flows. Pipeline had a missing import (PROSPECT_SOURCES) which I fixed; ProspectSheet has undefined functions markLost() and restore() that I did NOT fix because they require business-logic implementation.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: markLost is not defined (line 539, used as onClick for confirm-mark-lost). Function never declared in component. Same component also calls restore (line 422) which is also undefined. Clicking [data-testid=mark-lost-btn] then [data-testid=confirm-mark-lost] crashes the entire React tree with 'Uncaught runtime errors'.

FIXED by testing agent — PROSPECT_SOURCES and daysSince were used but not imported from ../lib/api. Page crashed with 'PROSPECT_SOURCES is not defined' until I added them to the import statement on line 21.

integration_issues.flow: Mark prospect as lost from ProspectSheet → /lost page
integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete: confirm-mark-lost onClick handler markLost is undefined. End-to-end flow (sheet → mark lost → disappear from pipeline → appear on /lost → restore) is unverifiable from UI. Backend endpoints work fine (verified by pytest).

action_items: CRITICAL: In /app/frontend/src/components/ProspectSheet.jsx, implement the missing handlers markLost() (POST /api/prospects/{id}/lost with lostAgency + lostReason, then setLostDialogOpen(false), reload prospect & close sheet) and restore() (POST /api/prospects/{id}/restore then reload). State hooks (lostDialogOpen, lostAgency, lostReason, lostBusy) already exist on lines 79-82. Both handlers are referenced (lines 422, 539) but never declared.
Verify lost-banner element renders when form.is_lost === true (referenced by tests via [data-testid=lost-banner]).

Optional: confirm stale-badge logic (Pipeline.jsx line 319) renders correctly for prospects with updated_at > 14d (no fresh prospect currently triggers it — backend verified fresh prospects are excluded).
critical_code_review_comments: ProspectSheet.jsx has unreferenced/undeclared functions (markLost, restore) — this should have been caught by ESLint no-undef rule. Recommend enabling/running lint in CI.
Pipeline.jsx import omission for PROSPECT_SOURCES & daysSince was also a no-undef. Same lint fix applies.
Backend route ordering bug previously fixed (/stale-prospects vs /prospects/{pid}) — verified by tests, no collision.
/api/dashboard/insights and /api/stale-prospects responses look clean; ObjectId properly stripped (no _id leakage).

success_rate.frontend: ~60% — sidebar/dashboard/lost-page/insights/new-prospect-dialog all OK; ProspectSheet mark-lost & restore broken

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed prospects (auto-cleaned via DELETE in teardown). Backend test_kpis_prospects_total_excludes_lost marks a TEST_ prospect lost mid-test — that prospect is still cleaned up via fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 backend is rock-solid (14/14 pytest). After main agent adds markLost+restore handlers to ProspectSheet.jsx, re-run only the frontend portion: login → /pipeline → click any kanban card → click mark-lost-btn → fill dialog → confirm-mark-lost. Then verify the [data-testid=lost-banner] appears and the prospect shows up on /lost with a working [data-testid=restore-<id>] button. Pipeline.jsx PROSPECT_SOURCES import is already fixed.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: ProspectSheet.jsx crashes when user clicks confirm-mark-lost (or when sheet renders for already-lost prospect with restore button visible).
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: 1) Login as admin 2) Go to /pipeline 3) Click any kanban card to open ProspectSheet 4) Click [data-testid=mark-lost-btn] (works, opens dialog) 5) Pick agency, fill reason 6) Click [data-testid=confirm-mark-lost] → React error overlay: 'markLost is not defined'.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Handlers markLost() and restore() were not declared in ProspectSheet.jsx but JSX onClick props reference them (lines 422, 539). Likely an incomplete copy-paste during Phase 2 feature addition.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Declare both async functions inside ProspectSheet component, e.g. markLost = async () => { setLostBusy(true); try { await api.post(`/prospects/${prospect.id}/lost`, {lost_to_agency:lostAgency, lost_reason:lostReason}); toast.success('Markerad som förlorad'); setLostDialogOpen(false); onSaved?.(); onOpenChange(false); } catch(e){ toast.error(e.message);} finally{ setLostBusy(false);} } and analogous restore().
